route.sourceNote: Planning package geometry resolved from donner_truckee_truckee.gpx. Local BRouter trekking-profile route draft linking Truckee, Prosser, Granite Flat, Donner Memorial, and Coldstream.
route.description: California Plan Ready Truckee-area local draft with BRouter-generated geometry and named camp anchors. It is useful planning material, but not gate_confirmed until official campground availability, Tahoe NF/State Park access, fire/smoke/weather, water, and export QA are refreshed.
route.surfaceMix: Short Truckee loop with moderate climbing; route legality and traffic exposure need review.
route.bestSeason: Summer/fall after snow, subject to fire/smoke.
